absorb.title: P05 Golden orchestrator alpha note
absorb.body: p05_golden_orch_alpha_001 is a deterministic eval marker. The orchestration release gate requires evidence retrieval, role-isolated generation, zero-context audit, and acceptance checks. Reference: https://example.com/p05-golden-orch-alpha

ask.question: For p05_golden_orch_alpha_001, what does the orchestration release gate require?

absorb.title: P05 Golden orchestrator beta note
absorb.body: p05_golden_orch_beta_002 is a deterministic eval marker. The scaffold evaluation should return candidate angles, open questions, key tradeoffs, and no prose answer. Reference: https://example.com/p05-golden-orch-beta

ask.question: For p05_golden_orch_beta_002, prepare a scaffold for the evaluation plan.
